blocked_screenshots.rationale: The interface shows a loading/empty state with illegible placeholder text overlaid on the main content area, indicating unfinished implementation; while the sidebar navigation is polished, the primary content region is not production-ready and appears to be in a broken cold-load state.
blocked_screenshots.expected_behavior: EXPECTED: This screenshot intentionally captures a loading/unsettled state as part of regression testing

blocked_screenshots.rationale: Multiple critical issues prevent shipping: loading state with spinner dominates main content area without clear context, placeholder skeleton cards lack animation or completion indicators, preview mode blocks core functionality without a clear path to sign-in, and the unsettled layout suggests incomplete implementation despite polished component design.
blocked_screenshots.expected_behavior: EXPECTED: This screenshot intentionally captures a loading/unsettled state as part of regression testing

scenario_regression.note: Timeout on first-time route navigation in dark mode sweep

modal_migration.pattern: DialogOverlay with focus trap + spring animation

key_learnings: All SSIM stability scores at 1.0000 — no animation jank or layout shift detected
Dark mode has zero compliance issues across all 36 test points
Reduced-motion was the largest gap (41/43 files unguarded) — now 100% compliant
Loading/unsettled states score low on visual quality (expected) — these test regression scenarios
Accessibility signals (focus rings, ARIA labels) are the most common Gemini-flagged concern
/dogfood route times out due to heavy video assets — consider lazy-loading walkthrough.mp4

recommendations.action: Add visible focus indicators to all interactive elements
Lazy-load /dogfood video assets to prevent route timeout
Add explicit empty-state illustrations for data-dependent routes
Increase contrast on secondary text in dark mode
Add ARIA labels to all icon-only buttons
